calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-09-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC.'s Motion To Vacate Judgment, as to the renewal judgment filed February 21, 2018 against defendant Aamer Khan only is GRANTED. No opposition filed and good cause shown. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR# 8600 =302/hk

Notice Of Motion For Approval Of Final Account, Final Report, Approving Receiver'S Fees And Costs, Discharging Receiver And Exonerating Surety; Pos
Off Calendar Mar-29-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted.
PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC., DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU'S Notice Of Motion For Approval Of Final Account, Final Report, Approving Receiver'S Fees And Costs, Discharging Receiver And Exonerating Surety is Granted. The Order provided with courtesy copies was signed in open court. Pro Tem Judge: Rebecca Woodson, not reported.

Notice And Motion For Award Fof Atty'S Fees
Off Calendar Dec-17-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on plaintiff's motion for an award for attorney fees.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Elizabeth McDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau.
No appearance by defendants Vientos Restaurant Group, Inc., a California corporation, dba Vientos Mexican Grill, Z-Grill, Inc., a California Corporation, dba Zinfandel Grille & Bar, dba Zinfaldel Grille, or Aamer Ashfaq Khan, a/k/a Aamer A. Khan, a/k/a Ashfag A. Khan, individually, as Guarantor of Vientos Restaurant Group and Z-Grille, Inc.

Good cause appearing, plaintiff's motion for and award of attorney fees is GRANTED. Defendants Vientos Restaurant Group, Inc., a California corporation, dba Vientos Mexican Grill, Z-Grill, Inc., a California Corporation, dba Zinfandel Grille & Bar, dba Zinfaldel Grille, and Aamer Ashfaq Khan, a/k/a Aamer A. Khan, a/k/a Ashfag A. Khan, individually, as Guarantor of Vientos Restaurant Group and Z-Grille, Inc., shall to plaintiff the sum of $3,100.00 as reasonable attorney fees.

Counsel for plaintiff shall submit a proposed Order to the Court no later than December 23, 2009.

Notice And Motion For Appointment Of Receiver And To Appoint Craig A. Block As Receiver
Off Calendar Nov-20-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. Off Calendar Oct-26-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Sep-29-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Robert Resner, Esq. for Plaintiff: Creditors Trade Assoc., Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau.
Plaintiff Witness Gary Looney was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Vientos restaurant Group, Inc., a California corp. dba Vientos Mexican Grill; Z-Grill, Inc., a California corp. dba Zinfandel Grille; Aamer Ashfaq Khan, aka Aamer A. Khan, aka Ashfag A. Khan, ind. as guarantor of Vientos Restaurant Group and Z-Grille, Inc., as follows:
Damages $29,028.02
Prejudgment Interest $2,162.32
Attorney's Fees per Motion.
Costs $547.50, for a total of $31,737.84
Judgment signed in open court.
